ogTitle: Croudace Bay vs Crowdy Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Croudace Bay and Crowdy Head.
heading: Croudace Bay vs Crowdy Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Croudace Bay, New South Wales and Crowdy Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Croudace Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Crowdy Head (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Croudace Bay or Crowdy Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Croudace Bay has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Crowdy Head scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Croudace Bay scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Crowdy Head scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Croudace Bay or Crowdy Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Croudace Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
